name: Argel Tal
titles: Argel Tal The Crimson Lord, Commander of the Serrated Sun
lore: Argel Tai was among the first to gaze into the madness of the Eye of Terror and in doing so was forever damned. Held as a prime example of his Primarch’s intentions for the future of humanity, a symbiotic fusion of human soul and daemonic power, he and his brothers in the Gal Vorbak would go on to play an instrumental role in the galactic tragedy that befell humanity. His counsel helped Lorgar solidify his understanding of the effects the powers of the Empyrean could have on the physical form of a Legionary, and he is venerated among the ranks of the Word Bearers as one who stood in glorious favour of their newfound gods.
